---
title: "CzechVeg-OpenStrat"
format: html
---

CzechVeg-OpenStrat is a publicly available, geographically and environmentally stratified subset of the Czech Vegetation Database, with harmonized taxonomy and nomenclature of plant taxa. The stratification process and choices are described [here](https://czechveg.github.io/DataProcessingTutorial/data_stratification.html), resampling procedure [here](https://czechveg.github.io/DataProcessingTutorial/data_resampling.html). CzechVeg-OpenStrat is only available in the CSV format (see the [Data processing tutorial](https://czechveg.github.io/DataProcessingTutorial/data_processing_tutorial.html)).

**Version 1.0**

-   Source database: CzechVeg-Open version 1.0, 10 March 2026
-   Size: 61,282 vegetation plots
-   DOI: <https:/doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18289905>
-   Licence: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International ([CC-BY](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/))
-   Download
    -   Vegetation-plot species data in CSV format
    -   Vegetation-plot header data in CSV format
    -   [Taxonomic backbone](https://github.com/CzechVeg/CzechVeg.github.io/blob/main/Data/crosswalk_tables/table_nomenclature.csv) (a table for interpretation of taxon concepts and names)
